scripts.env:check: sh -ec 'export BAO_ADDR="${BAO_ADDR:-${OPENBAO_ADDR:-}}"; export BAO_NAMESPACE="${BAO_NAMESPACE:-${OPENBAO_NAMESPACE:-}}"; export BAO_CACERT="${BAO_CACERT:-${OPENBAO_CACERT:-}}"; exec varlock load --show-all'
scripts.env:scan: sh -ec 'export BAO_ADDR="${BAO_ADDR:-${OPENBAO_ADDR:-}}"; export BAO_NAMESPACE="${BAO_NAMESPACE:-${OPENBAO_NAMESPACE:-}}"; export BAO_CACERT="${BAO_CACERT:-${OPENBAO_CACERT:-}}"; exec varlock scan --staged'
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run env:check
